name: Cluster Layout Intent
summary: A primitive layout region-role (#1680 taxonomy): composition-intent = a wrap-group of peers with even two-axis spacing. Identity is the arrangement, not the CSS — FUI ships one block per role and the mechanism (flex-wrap + gap) is an impl seam. Project-less; per-project styling rides presentational variants + plateau assembler presets.

gap.description: Even spacing inserted in both axes between wrapped peers, on a spacing scale. Open-numbered.

justify.description: Inline alignment of the wrap-group within its line. Most-permissive default: start.

align.description: Cross-axis alignment of items within a wrapped line. Default start.

description:
What This Is

A wrap-group of peer items that flow inline and wrap to new lines as space runs out, keeping even spacing in both axes — tag lists, action button rows, chip groups, meta rows.

Composition-intent (the identity)

A primitive layout region-role (layoutTier: region-role), one of the per-role taxonomy ratified in #1680. Its identity is the composition-intent — a wrap-group of peers with even two-axis spacing — impl-agnostic. FUI ships exactly one block for this role; the CSS mechanism (flex-wrap + gap) is an impl seam, never the role's identity (platform-decisions.md#layout-role-composition-intent).

Dimensions (UX-only)

  • gap: Even spacing inserted in both axes between wrapped peers, on a spacing scale. Open-numbered (none · xs · sm · md · lg · xl).
  • justify: Inline alignment of the wrap-group within its line. Most-permissive default: start (start · center · end · space-between).
  • align: Cross-axis alignment of items within a wrapped line. Default start (start · center · end · baseline).
